title: Fix demo black_band_opaque.py for V2 API
description: Demo fails with ModuleNotFoundError: pypixoo.animation. Migrate black_band_opaque.py to V2 API and verify real-device execution.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting fix now. Root cause: demo still imports removed legacy animation API.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fix implemented: migrated demos/black_band_opaque.py from legacy animation API to V2 flow (GifSequence + CycleItem + start_cycle loop=1). Validation: demo runs successfully on device and exits with 'Done (opaque)'.
